content: Process over-application is the dominant constraint failure mode, not fabrication
reason: Fabrication experiment (orch-go-wou2): 5-10 constraint agents propose triage 70-80% for urgent issues vs bare 0%. Classic fabrication (fake references) near-zero across all variants. U-shaped curve: danger zone is medium constraints.

content: Skill constraints should include urgency calibration early (at 3-10 constraint level)
reason: Fabrication experiment: 5C agents without urgency guidance score 20% on urgent scenarios vs 70% for full skill with urgency handling. Process without calibration creates U-shaped degradation.
